summary.lv: IT atbalsta speciālists Intrum Global Technologies — automatizāciju un klientu atskaišu izstrāde (C#, SQL/PL-SQL, .NET, Crystal Reports), pieteikumu risināšana un IRIS un Colldesk sistēmu atbalsts; nepieciešama 1. līmeņa atbalsta pieredze ar potenciālu attīstīties uz 2. līmeni.
summary.en: IT support specialist at Intrum Global Technologies building automations and client reports (C#, SQL/PL-SQL, .NET, Crystal Reports), resolving tickets and supporting the IRIS and Colldesk systems; Level 1 support experience with potential to grow to Level 2 required.
